description: One education entry — a degree, program, or course of study. The canonical, version-independent record an is.dame.resume references by AT URI, mirroring is.dame.resume.job so education can be selected and tailored the same way work history is.

main.description: Record key is a human-readable slug so resume backlinks read clearly and re-imports are idempotent.

area.description: Field of study, e.g. "Mass Communication / Media Studies".

studyType.description: Degree / credential, e.g. "Bachelor of Arts - BA".

highlights.description: Honors, activities, coursework. Shares the is.dame.resume.job#highlight shape so the renderer and selection logic are identical.
